GpuProjectExec
  GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[sum(CASE WHEN part.p_type LIKE Utf8("PROMO%") THEN lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount)]
    GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[sum(CASE WHEN part.p_type LIKE Utf8("PROMO%") THEN lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount)]
        GpuProjectExec
          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
            GpuHashJoinExec
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([p_partkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                  GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                    GpuScanExec: batch_size=14913080
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_partkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                    GpuFilterExec
                      GpuScanExec: batch_size=14913080
--- memory ---
total_cost=1280
GpuProjectExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, input_bytes=32, output_bytes=8, cost=40
  GpuAggregateExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, input_bytes=32, output_bytes=32, cost=64
    GpuCoalescePartitionsExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, input_bytes=32, output_bytes=32, cost=64
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, input_bytes=48, output_bytes=32, cost=80
        GpuProjectExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, input_bytes=64, output_bytes=48, cost=112
          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=64, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, input_bytes=64, output_bytes=64, cost=128
            GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=64, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, input_bytes=80, output_bytes=64, cost=144
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=40, input_bytes=40, output_bytes=40, cost=80
                GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=40, input_bytes=40, output_bytes=40, cost=80
                  GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=40, input_bytes=40, output_bytes=40, cost=80
                    GpuScanExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=40, input_bytes=0, output_bytes=40, cost=40
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=84, input_bytes=40, output_bytes=40, cost=80
                GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=84, input_bytes=40, output_bytes=40, cost=80
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=84, input_bytes=40, output_bytes=40, cost=80
                    GpuFilterExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=84, input_bytes=44, output_bytes=40, cost=84
                      GpuScanExec: row_width=44, subtree_max_row_bytes=44, input_bytes=0, output_bytes=44, cost=44
